title: Possibly impaired folate metabolism
detail: MTHFR rs1801131 (C) or MTHFR A1298C is a mutation in the folate pathway, specifically in the enzyme involved in converting 5-methylfolate (5MTHF) to tetrahydrofolate (THF). Defects in folate metabolism can increase the risk of neural tube defects and possibly contribute to risk of stroke / heart attack. Unlike rs1801133 or MTHFR C677T, this mutation does not lead to elevated homocysteine levels, however some studies have suggested that there may be a synergistic effect in individuals heterozygous for both mutations.
